name: BE READY
group: Bimekizumab 320 mg Q4W SC vs Placebo (BE READY; 16 wk PASI 90; adds bimekizumab-vs-placebo precision)

name: BE-READY
group: Moderate-severe plaque psoriasis, bimekizumab 320 mg Q4W vs placebo (4:1 randomization)

name: UltIMMa-2
group: Risankizumab 150mg Q12W | IL-23 (UltIMMa-2 pair to UltIMMa-1; PASI 90 wk 16). Denominators are mITT per Gordon 2018 Lancet (UltIMMa-2 ris arm n=294, pbo arm n=98). Prior dashboard values (tE=225, tN=301, cN=100) were UltIMMa-1-shaped numbers; corrected to UltIMMa-2 published primary.

name: TRANSFORM-2
group: TRD adults 18-64, intranasal esketamine 56-84 mg + oral AD vs intranasal placebo + oral AD (4 wk, MADRS MD)

name: BE-VIVID
group: Moderate-severe plaque psoriasis, bimekizumab 320 mg Q4W vs placebo arm of 3-arm RCT (3:2:1 bimi:ustek:placebo); ustekinumab arm reported separately

name: GEMINI-2
group: Vedolizumab 300 mg IV induction (wk 0, 2) | Integrin (moderate-severe CD; vs Placebo; GEMINI-2 wk 6 remission)

name: RESONATE
group: Ibrutinib vs Ofatumumab (R/R CLL; PFS HR 6-year update)

name: TRUE-NORTH
group: Ozanimod 1 mg PO daily induction | S1P modulator (moderate-severe UC; vs Placebo; TRUE-NORTH wk 10 remission; 2:1 randomization, n=429 ozanimod : n=216 placebo)

name: ULTIMATE II
group: Relapsing MS, ublituximab 450 mg IV Q6M vs teriflunomide 14 mg PO daily (ARR at 96 wk; rate ratio)

name: SUSTAIN-6
group: Semaglutide 0.5/1mg weekly vs placebo (SUSTAIN-6; primary MACE-3 of CV death, nonfatal MI, nonfatal stroke). HbA1c MD at 2y was -0.77% separately captured; primary CV HR shown here.

name: GEMINI-1
group: Vedolizumab 300 mg IV induction (wk 0, 2) | Integrin (moderate-severe UC; vs Placebo; GEMINI-1 wk 6 remission)

name: LUCENT-1
group: Mirikizumab 300 mg IV induction (wk 0, 4, 8) | IL-23p19 (moderate-severe UC; vs Placebo; LUCENT-1 wk 12 remission)

name: ACT-1
group: Infliximab 5 mg/kg IV (0, 2, 6 wk) | TNFi (moderate-severe UC; vs Placebo; ACT-1 wk 8 clinical remission)

name: PURSUIT-SC
group: Golimumab 200/100 mg SC induction | TNFi (moderate-severe UC; vs Placebo; PURSUIT-SC wk 6 remission)

name: UNIFI-induction
group: Ustekinumab 6 mg/kg IV induction | IL-12/23 (moderate-severe UC; vs Placebo; UNIFI wk 8 remission)

name: ULTRA-2
group: Adalimumab 160/80/40 mg SC induction | TNFi (moderate-severe UC; vs Placebo; ULTRA-2 wk 8 remission)

name: reSURFACE-2
group: Tildrakizumab 200mg vs Etanercept (reSURFACE-2 head-to-head; PASI 90 wk 12 OR)

name: AMAGINE-2
group: Brodalumab 210mg Q2W vs Ustekinumab 45/90mg (AMAGINE-2 head-to-head; PASI 90 wk 12 OR)

name: UNCOVER-2
group: Ixekizumab vs Etanercept | IL-17A vs TNFi

name: BE-SURE
group: Moderate-severe plaque psoriasis, bimekizumab 320 mg (Q4W and Q4W->Q8W combined) vs adalimumab 80/40 mg (active-controlled head-to-head)

name: SCORED
group: Sotagliflozin 200-400 mg daily | Dual SGLT1/2i (T2D + CKD + CV risk; vs placebo)

name: INNO2VATE
group: Vadadustat 150-600 mg PO QD vs darbepoetin alfa in dialysis-dependent CKD; primary safety MACE

name: ORAL-Standard
group: Tofacitinib 5 mg BID | JAK1/3 (MTX-IR RA; 3-arm with Ada; ACR20 wk 6 vs placebo, OR)

name: GWPCARE1
group: Dravet syndrome, cannabidiol 20 mg/kg/d vs placebo (wk 14, >=50% convulsive-seizure reduction RR)

name: ARISTOTLE
group: Apixaban 5 mg BID | DOAC (non-valvular AF with at least one CV risk factor; vs Warfarin INR 2-3; ARISTOTLE)

name: OCTAVE Induction 1
group: Tofacitinib 10 mg BID vs placebo, 8-week induction in moderate-severe UC; primary clinical remission at week 8 (Mayo)

name: PULSAR
group: Treatment-naive nAMD, aflibercept 8 mg IVT Q12W/Q16W vs aflibercept 2 mg Q8W (wk 48, BCVA MD)

name: SCALE Obesity
group: Overweight/obesity without DM, liraglutide 3.0 mg SC daily vs placebo (>=5% weight loss at 56 wk; OR)

name: LCIG-DUOcomp
group: LCIG intestinal gel vs oral PD

name: KarMMa-3
group: RRMM after 2-4 prior lines (triple-class exposed), ide-cel vs SoC (DPd, DVd, IRd, Kd, EPd)

name: PAOLA-1
group: All-comer high-grade ovarian, 1st-line maintenance olaparib + bevacizumab vs placebo + bevacizumab

name: DESTINY-Breast06
group: HR+ HER2-low or HER2-ultralow mBC post-endocrine, T-DXd vs chemo (PFS primary)

name: ECZTRA-1
group: Tralokinumab 300 mg SC Q2W | IL-13 mAb (moderate-severe AD; vs Placebo; ECZTRA-1 EASI-75 wk 16)

name: SAFEPRIM Burkina Faso
group: SAFEPRIM Burkina Faso. G6PD-deficient adult males with asymptomatic P. falciparum, primaquine 0.25 mg/kg vs 0.4 mg/kg (single-dose adjunct to AL). Primary endpoint: maximum percentage drop in haemoglobin from baseline through day 28. Pre-specified safety threshold (no haemolysis requiring transfusion) met at both doses, but 0.25 mg/kg had smaller mean drop (-10% vs -16%; difference -6 percentage points, 95% CI -11 to -1). Goncalves BP et al. Lancet ID 2016;16:1112-1120. DOI 10.1016/S1473-3099(16)30115-4. PMID 27339845. n=70 total (subset 25/25 G6PD-deficient analyzed for primary; remaining 20 G6PD-normal control).

name: NOR-TEST
group: AIS <=4.5 h, tenecteplase 0.4 mg/kg vs alteplase 0.9 mg/kg (90-day mRS 0-1 RR, non-inferiority)
